credentials_needed: GitHub or Google account (for OAuth sign-in)

form_fields.name: my-automaton
form_fields.description: An autonomous agent MCP server for automation tasks. Provides tools for web scraping, data extraction, and automated workflows. Connect any MCP-compatible client to leverage these capabilities.

notes: Server must be live and accessible at https://automation.songheng.vip before submission
Logo at https://automation.songheng.vip/logo.png currently returns 404 - needs a valid logo image
After submission, verify listing at https://mcp.so/servers
